title: Visualizing the Distribution of Sample Means
description: A flowchart demonstrating the process of generating sample means from a population and plotting their distribution to illustrate the Central Limit Theorem.
elements: Calculation of Sample Mean (x̄) for each sample
relationships: A population distribution serves as the source for drawing multiple random samples
Each random sample is used to calculate a single sample mean (x̄)
Many sample means are collected into a new dataset
A histogram is plotted from the collected sample means, revealing a normal distribution (Central Limit Theorem)
